coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to browse and search products by category and keyword.
Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to add products to cart and complete secure checkout.
task_titles: Enforce cart and complete secure checkout security controls

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to track their orders in real time after purchase.
task_titles: Implement orders in real time viewing workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Seller — The Seller should Allow sellers to manage product listings, inventory, and pricing.
task_titles: Implement product listings, inventory, and pricing management workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Seller — The Seller should Allow sellers to view sales analytics and revenue reports.
task_titles: Implement view sales and revenue reporting workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to submit product ratings and written reviews.
task_titles: Implement product ratings and written reviews creation workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should handle peak traffic during sale events with response times under two seconds for all browsing and checkout operations.
task_titles: Optimize peak traffic during sale events performance constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should encrypt sensitive data.
The system should meet accessibility requirements.
The system should integrate with at least one payment gateway for online transactions.
task_titles: Integrate at least one payment gateway

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should support Arabic and English UI.
The system should Ideally support cryptocurrency payments if technically feasible in future phases.
task_titles: Implement cryptocurrency payments if technically feasible in future phases workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should maintain responsive performance for concurrent users.

risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
3 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.
1 tasks are marked as optional or low-confidence scope and should be planned outside the confirmed delivery baseline.

Coordination hotspot: Optimize peak traffic during sale events performance constraints blocks 7 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 6 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 356 estimated hours | FR: 160h | NFR: 196h.
